copied_files.patch_reason: Rewrite imports from top-level forge package to private millforge._forge namespace; apply repo formatting/lint cleanup; where needed, replace Python 3.12 PEP 695 type alias syntax with equivalent TypeAlias assignment so local verification tools can parse the vendored subset. No behavioral change.

curated_private_files.patch_reason: Avoid exporting provider clients, server helpers, hardware discovery, tools, or slot worker from the private vendored subset.
Export only transport-free client protocol/helper types from clients/base.py.
Export only manager and fixed strategy classes; exclude hardware discovery.

Export only WorkflowRunner from the copied guarded-loop core subset. Use a lazy export so importing core submodules such as messages or workflow does not eagerly import WorkflowRunner and recreate circular imports in the reduced private subset.
Mirror guardrail subset exports after private namespace rewrite.
Mirror prompt-helper subset exports after private namespace rewrite.

private_behavior_patches.patch_reason: Project the bridge's serial tool-call requirement into provider-neutral model requests as parallel_tool_calls=false while retaining the runtime refusal guard if a provider still returns multiple calls.

Expose max_premature_attempts and max_prereq_violations on WorkflowRunner.__init__ and pass them to StepEnforcer so Millforge adapter policy can tune guarded-loop violation budgets without modifying unrelated runner behavior.
Add NonRetryableToolError for tool outcomes that must bypass model self-correction and propagate directly to adapter translation.
Catch NonRetryableToolError before the generic Exception branch so it is not converted to a retryable [ToolError] message or counted against generic tool-error correction budgets.

Make ToolSpec.from_json_schema fail closed for the supported V1 subset by rejecting unknown schema keywords, unsupported JSON types, malformed required lists, and arrays without item schemas before a model or tool call can occur.
Document the private mapped prerequisite representation used by Millforge to preserve compiled argument-match semantics when prerequisite and current argument names differ.

Extend arg-matched prerequisite checks to support separate prerequisite_arg and current_arg fields while retaining the upstream match_arg shorthand, preserving Millforge compiled prerequisite semantics without widening model-visible tool schemas.
Convert the curated core package export to a lazy WorkflowRunner lookup so the reduced private subset remains importable when callers import context or workflow modules directly.
Carry exact provider tool-call IDs and optional non-repr reasoning continuation on the private ToolCall handoff without a signature-keyed identity cache.
Retain and serialize typed reasoning continuation on its assistant tool-call message while preserving exact malformed string arguments during retry reconstruction.
Preserve provider tool-call IDs and reasoning continuation across inference validation retries instead of regenerating provider call identity.
Preserve reasoning continuation on tool, prerequisite, and premature-terminal retry turns and hand exact provider call identity directly to Millforge tool execution.
Count retained provider reasoning continuation in the existing fallback context token estimator.
Count reasoning continuation, preserve pairing fields during result truncation, and compact completed replay-bearing tool turns atomically.

excluded_upstream_paths.reason: not required by fixed Millforge sampling policy
hardware discovery is not required by fixed context policy
server-style slot worker outside guarded-loop subset
built-in tool implementation outside adapter bridge

runtime_dependency_note: Runtime imports use only src/millforge/_forge; ref-forge/ is optional test provenance input and is not imported by package code.
